name: PayPal
description: PayPal REST API enables you to accept payments, send payouts, manage subscriptions, and issue refunds. It supports credit cards, debit cards, PayPal wallet, and alternative payment methods across 200+ markets. The API uses OAuth 2.0 for authentication and provides a complete commerce platform for online and mobile payments.

auth.note: Obtain client_id and client_secret from PayPal Developer Dashboard. Use client credentials grant (POST to token_url with Basic auth) to get an access token.

capabilities.name: create_order
capabilities.description: Create a new payment order with one or more purchase units. The order must be approved by the buyer before it can be captured. Supports PayPal wallet, cards, and alternative payment methods.

capabilities.name: capture_payment
capabilities.description: Capture an authorized payment on an approved order. This finalizes the transaction and moves funds from the buyer to the seller. Can capture the full amount or a partial amount.

capabilities.name: create_payout
capabilities.description: Send money to one or more recipients via PayPal email, phone, or PayPal ID. Useful for marketplace disbursements, affiliate commissions, and employee bonuses.

capabilities.name: issue_refund
capabilities.description: Refund a captured payment either fully or partially. The refund goes back to the original payment method. You can issue multiple partial refunds up to the original captured amount.

capabilities.name: create_subscription
capabilities.description: Create a recurring subscription for a buyer against a pre-defined billing plan. Handles automatic recurring payments, trial periods, and subscription lifecycle management.
